summary: Tested iteration 55 features: New 'Achats terminés' sub-tab in Achats section with dedicated print buttons (Ticket 80mm + Imprimer A4). All features working correctly for both Admin and Gérante roles.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx: New 'achats-subtab-termines' subtab correctly positioned as 5th tab after Validation en cours / À réviser / Achats validés / Rejetés
AchatsTab.jsx: Badge counter correctly shows only 'completed' status expenses count
AchatsTab.jsx: 'completed-expenses-card' displays with correct data-testid and print buttons
AchatsTab.jsx: Sub-items for grouped lists (is_group=true) display correctly with category, qty, unit price, amount
CaissePage.jsx: printCompletedExpensesTicket() generates 80mm thermal ticket with 'ACHATS TERMINES' title
CaissePage.jsx: printAllCompletedExpenses() generates A4 document with 'Historique des Achats Terminés' title
Both print functions use window.open() and handle popup blocking gracefully
'Achats validés' subtab now correctly counts only 'approved' status (not 'completed')
seed_data_creation: Used existing expense and toggled status between 'approved' and 'completed' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 added a dedicated 'Achats terminés' sub-tab in the Achats section. This tab shows only expenses with status='completed' and has two print buttons: Ticket 80mm (thermal) and Imprimer A4. The 'Achats validés' tab now only shows 'approved' expenses (not 'completed'). Both Admin and Gérante roles can access this tab.

frontend: achats-subtab-termines displays with correct badge counter for completed expenses
completed-expenses-card shows when completed expenses exist
print-completed-ticket-btn triggers printCompletedExpensesTicket() with toast 'Ouverture du ticket d'impression...'
completed-expense-{id} data-testid present for each completed expense
Sub-items display for grouped lists (is_group=true) with category, qty, unit price, amount
Empty state 'Aucun achat terminé' displays when no completed expenses
No regression on other subtabs (Validation en cours / À réviser / Rejetés)
Both Admin and Gérante roles can access the new tab

test_scenarios_executed: Verify all 5 subtabs present (en_cours, a_reviser, valides, termines, rejetes) - SUCCESS
Click 'Achats terminés' subtab with 0 completed - shows empty state - SUCCESS
Update expense to status='completed' via API - SUCCESS
Verify 'Achats terminés' shows completed expense with sub-items - SUCCESS
Verify print-completed-ticket-btn triggers window.open and toast - SUCCESS
Verify 'Achats validés' shows approved expense - SUCCESS
Verify 'Achats terminés' shows empty state again - SUCCESS
Verify all subtabs visible for Gérante - SUCCESS
Verify 'Achats terminés' tab works for Gérante - SUCCESS
Verify 'À réviser' tab shows revision_requested expenses - SUCCESS
Verify 'Rejetés' tab shows empty state - SUCCESS
